root_cause.summary: 4 Octopus Energy published jobs (Partnerships Manager x2, Digital Marketing Manager, Performance Marketing Lead) flagged as hard validation failures because they are UK-based Lever ATS roles missing from the US-scoped Octopus career page snapshot.

details.source_scope_mismatch: The source scrape URL filters by US locations (Austin, TX; Houston, TX; United States, Remote) but the 4 roles are UK-based (London (GB)), so they never appear in the scrape results.

all_conditions_must_be_true: item.priority exists and is not null
exemption_criteria.why_narrow: Only UK-based Octopus Energy roles scraped from Lever ATS are intentionally curated priority roles. The US-scoped scrape URL will never find them, but they are legitimate, hand-curated public roles. Generic Octopus jobs (non-UK, non-Lever, no priority) still fail validation if missing from source.

fixes_applied.change: Added isOctopusUkLeverPriorityRole helper function and exported it
fixes_applied.purpose: Narrow exemption: only UK-based Lever-hosted Octopus Energy roles with positive non-excluded priority scores are exempt from missing-from-source checks.

fixes_applied.change: Replaced broad priority exemption with isOctopusUkLeverPriorityRole in octopusMissingFromSnapshot filter
Replaced broad priority exemption in retain/archive decision for reconcileOctopusRecords
Replaced broad priority exemption in missingFromSourceIds filter

still_enforced: Octopus public cap (5) — still enforced regardless of priority
Excluded Octopus roles on public board — still flagged as priority violations
Non-UK, non-Lever Octopus jobs missing from snapshot — still flagged as hard failures
Generic (non-priority) Octopus jobs missing from snapshot — still flagged as hard failures
Octopus jobs missing from snapshot for other orgs (e.g. Other Company via Lever) — still flagged
Missing-from-source lifecycle (grace period, confirmations, archive) — still applies to non-exempted jobs
safety_guarantees.only_exempted: Octopus Energy jobs that meet ALL 6 criteria: Octopus org, positive non-excluded priority, Lever ATS URL, UK location (London/GB/UK/United Kingdom).
